poetry.description: Not a poetry project; let pep621 own pyproject.toml so [build-system].requires is tracked.

description: The typing-extensions pin for python_version < '3.9'; 4.14.0 raised requires-python to >=3.9.
Renovate drops the PEP 508 marker, so both pins of a split dependency look identical to it: matchCurrentVersion tells them apart, and the cap itself comes from each release's requires_python.
Only old pins are capped, on purpose. A new pin or an unsplit dependency dropping an old Python should open a PR that fails CI, not freeze silently.
The constraint must be a bare version: pep440 has no subset(), so a range would filter out every release.

packageRules.description: The pytest-cov pin for python_version < '3.9'; 6.0.0 raised requires-python to >=3.9.
The pytest pin for python_version < '3.9'; 8.4.0 raised requires-python to >=3.9.
The pytest pin for python_version == '3.9'; 9.0.0 raised requires-python to >=3.10.
